justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent only offered the 4 PM slot, completely ignoring the user's preference for "any time after half past 5 in the evening."
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made multiple check_availability calls, some of which were redundant, before offering a single slot.
justifications.customer_experience: The customer experience was acceptable, but the agent's failure to acknowledge the user's full time preference was a notable oversight.
